name: Barracuda Networks, Inc.
h1: Barracuda Networks's GCC footprint in India
lede: Barracuda Networks runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Pune, covering R&D and IT, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Barracuda Networks office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Barracuda Networks, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Barracuda Networks runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Pune), covering R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Barracuda Networks's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Pune, spanning R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all ten decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Barracuda Networks operate in India?
faq.a: Barracuda Networks operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Barracuda Networks have centers in?
faq.a: Barracuda Networks's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Barracuda Networks run in India?
faq.a: Barracuda Networks runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Barracuda Networks's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Barracuda Networks's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Barracuda Networks's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Barracuda Networks's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
